scripts.build: wrangler types --check && vp exec vite build
scripts.check: wrangler types --check && vp exec svelte-kit sync && vp exec svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: vp exec svelte-kit sync && vp exec svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit -- --run && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: vp exec playwright install && vp exec playwright test
